demographics.living_situation: lives independently; estranged from family of origin for several years, with a close 'chosen family' network of friends

contact_nok.relationship: close friend / chosen-family member (present at the visit)

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My throat is closing up, I can't breathe properly, and my chest feels like it's being crushed by a boulder. It came on all of a sudden tonight and it's really scaring me.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It started suddenly this evening at a holiday get-together and it feels like I can't get air — I couldn't wait until morning.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on suddenly tonight during a holiday gathering — it hit right after we made a toast
symptom_narrative.duration: the last hour or so, since it started
symptom_narrative.character: my throat feels tight and like it's closing, it's hard to swallow, and my chest feels heavy and crushing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really frightening — it feels severe, like I can't get a proper breath
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: high up at the front of my throat, and across my chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on all at once and hasn't really let up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much; if I sit still and try to slow down it eases a tiny bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it won't ease up, and I feel more panicked the longer it goes on
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my heart is racing and pounding and I feel shaky and worked up
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get milder waves of this feeling around the holidays, but never anything this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I had to step away from everyone — I can't think about anything except my throat and trying to breathe

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: no ongoing health problems that I know of; never had asthma or heart trouble

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: none — I don't take any regular medications

allergies_as_reported.substance: no known food or drug allergies

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I've been estranged from my family of origin for a few years and the holidays are really hard for me. Tonight I was with my chosen family — close friends who are like family — and this hit me during a toast to 'family'.

communication_style.typical_message_style: types in urgent, breathless bursts; keeps returning to the throat and breathing sensation

reluctance_topics: grief and guilt about family estrangement

objective_data_offered.value: my heart feels like it's racing and pounding
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's subjective sensation, not a measured rate

objective_data_offered.value: breathing fast and shallow, gripping at the front of the throat and swallowing over and over
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: impression over a video/phone call; the inside of the throat and airway cannot be seen

objective_data_offered.value: looks flushed, sweaty and very distressed, sitting hunched and struggling to settle their breathing
at a decorated holiday gathering; several concerned friends waiting nearby
